title: More Features
description: Adds a lot of different stuff to your BTA playthrough
body:
This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.

More Features is a mod that adds some random stuff to your BTA world.
List of stuff:

- Colored glowstone blocks
Work the same, but now in different colors! (have [NoName Dyes](https://github.com/Gooey-Goo/BTANoNameDyes/releases) support)

- Colored paperwall blocks
Have different texture for every dye. Texture can be changed in config to have either flowers, full color or special texture for every block. (have NoName Dyes support)

- Colored glass blocks
THe same as normal glass blocks, but now with different colors! (Have NoName Dyes support)
 
- Gilding table
Allows you to convert your quiver or bomb bag into their golden variations!

- Rainbow flower
Can't be crafted into a dye, but used to multiply other dyes! 1 flower + 1 of any dye = 3 that dye.

- Flower crowns
Can be crafted from dandelion, rose, cherry flowering leaves. Gives no protection, purely visual...Don't craft a adead bush crown

- Material crowns
One craft for every armor set, including armor from this mod. The same stats as helmet.

- Bedrock armor
Has a lot of durability and has 100/100 points of protection from every damage source in BTA

- Plate armor
Copy of plate armor from old versions. Can't be crafted, only found in dungeons. Can be repaired with iron.

- Studded armor
A combination of chain and leather armor both in stats and visual. Can be repaired with chainlinks.

- Stone armor
Can be crafted using any type of stone. Sligtly worse version of iron armor.

- Olivine armor
Can be crafted using olivine. Makes player move faster.

- Quartz armor
Just weak armor that is easily renevable.

- Bomb quiver and golden bomb quiver
Both used as quiver alternative for hand cannon. Normal bomb quiver can be crafted and can hold up to 48 explosive charges. Golden one can't be crafted but have infinite amount of explosive charges.

- Workbench on a stick
Can be right clicked to open crafting gui anywhere you need.

- Mob soul
Drops when you kill a mob with golden sword. Is used to change mob in spawner.

- More dungeons
Now dungeon for every stone type, not only classic stone (granite, basalt, limestone). Dungeon have a chance to be made with bricks. Dungeons in desert will have a chance to have a scorpio spawner. Dungeons in swamp will be made with logs and mud and have a chance to have a creeeper spawner. 

AND MUCH MORE!
